Local path |\n| Cron | Low | Scheduled tasks | Shared volume |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Architecture Decision"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  A[Choose Deployment]
